name: Izamu
title: The Armor

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Eternal
abilities.text: During the end phase, this model heals 4.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (unusual_defense) abilities of other models.

abilities.name: Unyielding
abilities.text: When this model would be moved or controlled by another model, its owner may drain a (soulstone) to ignore that effect.

actions.name: Nagamaki
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Sp of 7 or greater, this action receives +1 Skl.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (shielded) abilities.

triggers.name: Ancestral Curse
triggers.text: The target gains an Adversary token.

triggers.name: Grisly Visage
triggers.text: Once per activation. Place this model into base contact with the target and declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

actions.name: Heroic Intervention
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy engaged with another friendly model only.
actions.effects: Move all friendly models engaged with the target 5" away from the target. Then, place this model in base contact with the target. This model may declare a (melee) targeting the target.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.

extraction_notes: The Ruthless ability references an unusual defense icon which I've rendered as (unusual_defense)
